title: eragrostis obtusa
intro: Eragrostis obtusa, also known as False Bottlebrush Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce pain. The health benefits of Eragrostis obtusa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support skin health. Eragrostis obtusa can be prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to utilize its medicinal properties, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional Australian and New Zealand medicine.
